recommendations.title: Chicuarotes

recommendations.title: American Animals
recommendations.overview: Lexington, Kentucky, 2004. Four young men attempt to execute one of the most audacious art heists in the history of the United States.

recommendations.title: Scarecrows
recommendations.overview: Five men heist the Camp Pendleton payroll and kidnap a pilot and his daughter, who are forced to fly them to Mexico. Enroute a double cross has one of the thieves parachute with the loot into an abandoned farm surrounded by strange scarecrows. The re

recommendations.title: How to Steal a Million
recommendations.overview: A woman must steal a statue from a Paris museum to help conceal her father's art forgeries.

recommendations.title: The Mastermind
recommendations.overview: In a sedate Massachusetts suburb circa 1970, unemployed family man and amateur art thief J.B. Mooney sets out on his first heist. With the museum cased and accomplices recruited, he has an airtight plan. Or so he thinks.

recommendations.title: Capernaum
recommendations.overview: After running away from his negligent parents, committing a violent crime and being sentenced to five years in jail, a hardened, streetwise 12-year-old Lebanese boy sues his parents in protest of the life they have given him.

recommendations.title: Casa de Mi Padre
recommendations.overview: Scheming of a way to save their father's ranch, the Alvarez brothers find themselves in a war with Mexico's most feared drug lord.

recommendations.title: Lying and Stealing
recommendations.overview: Hoping to leave his criminal lifestyle behind him, a successful art thief teams up with a sexy con woman to pull off the ultimate heist and set himself free.

recommendations.title: Federal Bank Heist
recommendations.overview: "The Baron" wanted to commit the perfect heist involving 3 tons of money and no violence. For this he would need the right people willing to get 1 million dollars to take part in this job. Based on true events, in 2005, 168,000,000 Brazilian Real (al

recommendations.title: The Blonde One
